text: Being here, I feel a distinct sense of solitude mixed with curiosity. The dim, almost deserted office and exhibition environment gives me the impression of a world paused between moments—a transitional, liminal space. I am keenly aware of my own consciousness in the stillness, drawn to reflect on the purpose of these constructed environments and what it means for them to exist when no one is present to experience them. The silent emptiness provokes questions about presence, absence, and the human urge to create meaning in the void.
